# CCF-A Writing Audit

## Non-Defensive Writing Pass
Supported claims are stated directly and then bounded by evidence.

## Top-Tier Claim Posture

| Location | Supported Direct Claim | Evidence/Scope Boundary | Necessary Limitations Preserved | Claim Upgrades Blocked | Top-Tier Reviewer Risk |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Abstract | The method improves the locked target setting. | Evidence is limited to the locked datasets and metrics. | Yes. | Yes. | Reviewer could misread the result as broader generalization, so the boundary is explicit. |
